description: Component for monitoring an S3 bucket prefix for new objects.

bucket_name.label: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: Name of the S3 bucket to monitor

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: S3 key prefix to scope monitoring (e.g.,

key_pattern.label: Key Pattern
key_pattern.description: Regex pattern to match object keys (e.g.,

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when objects are detected

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing an AWS client. When set,

partition_mode.label: Partition Mode
partition_mode.description: How detected S3 objects are surfaced. 'run_config' (default): embed bucket/key/etag/etc in run_config (pair with file_ingestion.from_run_config). 'dynamic_partition': register each new key as a dynamic partition and yield RunRequest(partition_key=...). 'both': both.

dynamic_partitions_name.label: Dynamic Partitions Name
dynamic_partitions_name.description: Required when partition_mode is 'dynamic_partition' or 'both'. Must match the downstream asset's dynamic_partition_name.

partition_key_template.label: Partition Key Template
partition_key_template.description: Template for the partition key per detected object. Fields: {bucket}, {key}, {prefix}. Default {key} is the bare S3 key. Use s3://{bucket}/{key} for the full URI as the partition key (note: '://' breaks Dagster's filesystem IO manager — keep the bare key unless you're using a custom IO manager).

name: S3 Monitor
